description: The SunflowerApp project is open in Android Studio. It currently stores plant data in an in-memory MutableList inside PlantRepository, which means all data is lost when the app restarts. Implement Room database persistence to store plant data in a local SQLite database, replacing the in-memory storage in PlantRepository. The implementation must include the necessary Room Entity, DAO, and Database components. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. The project must compile successfully.
